notes: Go monorepo with three cmd/ entrypoints (api-server, worker, migrate), shared internal/ packages, and colocated _test.go files. Tests run via a Makefile target that wraps go test with coverage flags. Exercises multiple entrypoints in one repo, Makefile command validation, distribution-style testing, and stdlib-only Go (frameworks must be empty array). Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
